<blog>

# Nutrio: Healthy Meal Delivery & Nutrition Tracking Platform

## Project Introduction

Nutrio is a comprehensive digital platform designed to revolutionize healthy meal delivery and nutrition tracking through an integrated ecosystem of customer, partner, driver, and administrative portals. The platform combines cutting-edge nutrition science with seamless technology to provide personalized meal experiences while maintaining operational efficiency across multiple business roles.

### Purpose Statement
Nutrio aims to bridge the gap between healthy eating and convenient delivery by offering intelligent meal planning, real-time nutrition tracking, and an intuitive multi-role platform that serves customers, restaurant partners, delivery drivers, and administrators.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Personalization**: Deliver adaptive nutrition recommendations based on individual health profiles and goals
- **Accessibility**: Provide seamless cross-platform experience through web and native mobile applications
- **Operational Excellence**: Streamline meal delivery operations with intelligent routing and driver management
- **Data-Driven Insights**: Offer comprehensive analytics for both customers and business stakeholders

### Target Audience
- **Customers**: Health-conscious individuals seeking convenient, nutritious meal delivery
- **Restaurant Partners**: Food establishments looking to expand their digital presence and reach
- **Delivery Drivers**: Independent contractors managing efficient meal delivery routes
- **Administrators**: Platform operators overseeing system operations and business analytics

## Technical Architecture

The Nutrio platform follows a modern, scalable architecture designed for cross-platform deployment and multi-role functionality.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Web Application] --> B[React Frontend]
    C[Native Mobile Apps] --> D[Capacitor Bridge]
    D --> B
    B --> E[Supabase Backend]
    E --> F[Edge Functions]
    E --> G[(PostgreSQL Database)]
    
    H[WebSocket Server] --> I[Real-time Updates]
    J[AI/ML Services] --> K[Nutrition Analysis]
    L[E2E Testing] --> M[Playwright Suite]
    
    subgraph "Frontend Layer"
        B
        N[React Router]
        O[React Query]
    end
    
    subgraph "Backend Layer"
        E
        F
        P[Authentication]
    end
    
    subgraph "Infrastructure"
        G
        Q[Monitoring]
        R[Analytics]
    end
    
    B --> N
    B --> O
    E --> P
    E --> Q
    E --> R
```

### Component Breakdown

The architecture consists of several interconnected layers:

**Frontend Layer**: Built with React 18 and TypeScript, utilizing modern libraries including Radix UI for accessible components, Framer Motion for animations, and React Router for navigation.

**Backend Layer**: Powered by Supabase providing authentication, real-time database capabilities, and edge functions for serverless processing.

**Mobile Layer**: Capacitor-based native applications enabling offline functionality and device-specific features.

**Data Layer**: PostgreSQL database with Supabase's real-time capabilities and edge functions for complex business logic.

### Design Patterns

The platform implements several key design patterns:

- **Multi-Tenant Architecture**: Single codebase supporting multiple user roles with role-based access control
- **Microservices Pattern**: Edge functions handling specialized business logic
- **Repository Pattern**: Consistent data access through Supabase client abstractions
- **Provider Pattern**: Context-based state management for authentication, analytics, and language

### System Relationships

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant A as Auth Context
    participant S as Supabase
    participant DB as Database
    participant AF as Auth Functions
    
    U->>A: Login Request
    A->>S: signInWithPassword
    S->>AF: Verify Credentials
    AF->>DB: Validate User
    DB-->>AF: User Data
    AF-->>S: Authentication Result
    S-->>A: Session Created
    A-->>U: Authenticated
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points

**Application Bootstrap** (`src/main.tsx`)
- Initializes monitoring systems (Sentry, PostHog)
- Sets up native app capabilities via Capacitor
- Configures error boundaries and language provider
- Manages splash screen for native platforms

**Core Application** (`src/App.tsx`)
- Implements comprehensive routing system with lazy loading
- Provides role-based protected routes
- Integrates React Query for state management
- Supports multi-layout architecture (Customer, Partner, Admin, Driver)

### Core Modules

**Authentication System** (`src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx`)
- Centralized authentication state management
- Supabase integration with custom storage adapter
- IP location validation for security
- Push notification initialization for native platforms

**Supabase Integration** (`src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`)
- Custom storage adapter for Capacitor native apps
- Environment variable validation
- Session persistence across platform transitions

**Fleet Management** (`src/fleet/routes.tsx`)
- Dedicated portal for fleet operations
- Driver management and vehicle tracking
- Real-time route optimization
- Payout processing automation

### Configuration Approach

**Build Configuration** (`vite.config.ts`)
- Multi-target build system supporting web and mobile
- Source map generation for error tracking
- Code splitting for optimal performance
- Development and production optimizations

**Testing Configuration** (`playwright.config.ts`)
- Comprehensive E2E testing suite covering 927+ test cases
- Cross-portal workflow testing
- Parallel execution with CI/CD integration
- Detailed reporting and debugging capabilities

### External Dependencies

**Frontend Dependencies**:
- React 18.3.1 with React Router 7.13.0 for navigation
- Radix UI primitives for accessible components
- Tailwind CSS for styling with custom theme
- Framer Motion for smooth animations
- React Query 5.83.0 for state management

**Backend Dependencies**:
- Supabase for authentication and database
- Edge functions for serverless processing
- Sentry for error monitoring
- PostHog for analytics tracking

### Integration Points

**Native Platform Integration** (`src/lib/capacitor.ts`)
- Camera access for meal photo analysis
- Local notifications for order updates
- Biometric authentication support
- File system integration for offline data

**External Service Integration**:
- WhatsApp API for customer communication
- Email services for notifications
- Payment processing integration
- Mapping services for delivery tracking

### Component Relationship Diagrams

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Auth Context] --> B[Supabase Client]
    B --> C[Edge Functions]
    C --> D[Database]
    
    E[Protected Routes] --> F[Layout Components]
    F --> G[Feature Pages]
    
    H[React Query] --> I[Cached Data]
    I --> J[UI Components]
    
    K[Capacitor Bridge] --> L[Native Features]
    L --> M[Device APIs]
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

**Multi-Role Portal System**
- Customer portal with meal ordering and nutrition tracking
- Partner portal for restaurant management and analytics
- Driver portal for delivery operations and earnings
- Administrative portal for platform oversight

**Adaptive Nutrition System**
- Personalized meal recommendations based on health profiles
- Dynamic goal adjustment based on progress tracking
- Intelligent portion sizing and nutritional balance
- Integration with wearable fitness devices

**Advanced Delivery Management**
- Real-time order tracking and status updates
- Intelligent driver assignment and route optimization
- Automated delivery scheduling and notifications
- Comprehensive delivery analytics and reporting

### Implementation Highlights

**Adaptive Goal Engine** (`src/hooks/useAdaptiveGoals.ts`)
- Machine learning-based goal adjustment
- Behavioral prediction algorithms
- Personalized nutrition recommendations
- Real-time progress adaptation

**Dynamic Meal Allocation** (`supabase/functions/smart-meal-allocator/`)
- Algorithmic meal distribution optimization
- Demand forecasting and supply matching
- Geographic proximity consideration
- Capacity utilization maximization

**Behavior Prediction Engine** (`supabase/functions/behavior-prediction-engine/`)
- User engagement pattern analysis
- Churn risk assessment
- Personalization score calculation
- Retention strategy recommendations

### Feature Architecture Diagrams

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Unauthenticated
    Unauthenticated --> CustomerPortal: Login
    Unauthenticated --> PartnerPortal: Business Registration
    Unauthenticated --> DriverPortal: Driver Application
    Unauthenticated --> AdminPortal: System Access
    
    CustomerPortal --> MealSelection: Browse Menu
    CustomerPortal --> ProgressTracking: Track Goals
    CustomerPortal --> OrderHistory: View Orders
    
    PartnerPortal --> MenuManagement: Manage Meals
    PartnerPortal --> OrderProcessing: Handle Orders
    PartnerPortal --> AnalyticsDashboard: View Reports
    
    DriverPortal --> DeliveryAssignment: Receive Orders
    DriverPortal --> RouteOptimization: Navigate Routes
    DriverPortal --> EarningsTracking: Monitor Income
    
    AdminPortal --> UserManagement: Manage Users
    AdminPortal --> SystemAnalytics: Monitor Performance
    AdminPortal --> ContentManagement: Update Platform
    
    CustomerPortal --> [*]: Logout
    PartnerPortal --> [*]: Logout
    DriverPortal --> [*]: Logout
    AdminPortal --> [*]: Logout
```

**Performance Optimization Features**
- Lazy loading for improved initial load times
- Code splitting for route-based bundling
- Caching strategies for frequently accessed data
- Progressive web app capabilities for offline functionality

**Security and Compliance**
- End-to-end encryption for sensitive data
- GDPR compliance for European users
- PCI DSS compliant payment processing
- Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments

**Scalability Considerations**
- Microservice architecture for independent scaling
- Load balancing for high-traffic periods
- Database optimization for large datasets
- CDN integration for global content delivery

---
